label: Faction
description: Defines a faction - a political group with its own name, tech level, pawn composition, ideology preferences, diplomatic stance, and world presence.

isPlayer.label: Is player
isPlayer.description: If true, this is the player's own faction. Only one faction should have this set.

factionNameMaker.label: Faction name maker
factionNameMaker.description: RulePackDef used to generate random faction names.

settlementNameMaker.label: Settlement name maker
settlementNameMaker.description: RulePackDef used to generate random settlement names for this faction.

playerInitialSettlementNameMaker.label: Player initial settlement name maker
playerInitialSettlementNameMaker.description: RulePackDef used to name the player's first settlement when this faction is the player faction.

fixedName.label: Fixed name
fixedName.description: A fixed faction name used instead of a generated one.

humanlikeFaction.label: Humanlike faction
humanlikeFaction.description: If true, this faction generates humanlike pawns and is subject to backstory, ideology, and social rules.

hidden.label: Hidden
hidden.description: If true, this faction is hidden from the world map and faction overview UI.

listOrderPriority.label: List order priority
listOrderPriority.description: Sort order in the faction list UI. Higher values appear later.

pawnGroupMakers.label: Pawn group makers
pawnGroupMakers.description: List of PawnGroupMaker templates this faction uses to generate raids, settlements, and trader groups.

raidCommonalityFromPointsCurve.label: Raid commonality from points curve
raidCommonalityFromPointsCurve.description: SimpleCurve mapping raid point budget to a relative chance of this faction raiding. Factions without this curve always have commonality 1.

autoFlee.label: Auto flee
autoFlee.description: If true, raiders from this faction will flee when enough attackers are downed.

attackersDownPercentageRangeForAutoFlee.label: Attackers down percentage range for auto flee
attackersDownPercentageRangeForAutoFlee.description: FloatRange of attacker-down percentages at which auto-flee can trigger. Evaluated as a random draw in this range each check.

canSiege.label: Can siege
canSiege.description: If true, this faction may use siege raid strategies.

canStageAttacks.label: Can stage attacks
canStageAttacks.description: If true, this faction may stage raids that build up before attacking.

canUseAvoidGrid.label: Can use avoid grid
canUseAvoidGrid.description: If true, pawns of this faction use the danger-avoidance pathfinding grid.

canPsychicRitualSiege.label: Can psychic ritual siege
canPsychicRitualSiege.description: If true, this faction may use psychic ritual siege attacks (Anomaly expansion).

earliestRaidDays.label: Earliest raid days
earliestRaidDays.description: The earliest game day on which this faction may launch a raid.

allowedArrivalTemperatureRange.label: Allowed arrival temperature range
allowedArrivalTemperatureRange.description: FloatRange of tile temperatures at which this faction's raids and visits can arrive. Raids outside this range are suppressed.

minSettlementTemperatureChanceCurve.label: Min settlement temperature chance curve
minSettlementTemperatureChanceCurve.description: SimpleCurve mapping tile temperature to the probability that this faction places a settlement there. Lower temperatures reduce settlement placement.

basicMemberKind.label: Basic member kind
basicMemberKind.description: PawnKindDef representing a generic member of this faction used for non-combat generation contexts.

startingResearchTags.label: Starting research tags
startingResearchTags.description: ResearchProjectTagDefs marking research projects that colonists from this faction start the game having already completed.

startingTechprintsResearchTags.label: Starting techprints research tags
startingTechprintsResearchTags.description: ResearchProjectTagDefs marking research projects for which colonists from this faction start with techprints.

recipePrerequisiteTags.label: Recipe prerequisite tags
recipePrerequisiteTags.description: String tags that gate which recipes require membership in this faction type as a prerequisite.

rescueesCanJoin.label: Rescuees can join
rescueesCanJoin.description: If true, captured or rescued pawns from this faction may be recruited.

pawnSingular.label: Pawn singular
pawnSingular.description: Singular noun used in UI text to refer to a single member of this faction (e.g. outlander, tribesman).

pawnsPlural.label: Pawns plural
pawnsPlural.description: Plural noun used in UI text to refer to multiple members of this faction (e.g. outlanders, tribespeople).

leaderTitle.label: Leader title
leaderTitle.description: Title used for the faction leader (e.g. chief, boss, prime councilor).

leaderTitleFemale.label: Leader title (female)
leaderTitleFemale.description: Female-gendered version of the leader title, if different from the default.

royalFavorLabel.label: Royal favor label
royalFavorLabel.description: Label for the royal favor resource granted by this faction (Royalty expansion).

royalFavorIconPath.label: Royal favor icon path
royalFavorIconPath.description: Texture path for the royal favor icon shown in the UI.

fixedLeaderKinds.label: Fixed leader kinds
fixedLeaderKinds.description: PawnKindDefs that must be used when generating this faction's leader. If empty, the leader kind is chosen freely.

leaderForceGenerateNewPawn.label: Leader force generate new pawn
leaderForceGenerateNewPawn.description: If true, a new pawn is always generated for the leader role rather than promoting an existing faction member.

forageabilityFactor.label: Forageability factor
forageabilityFactor.description: Multiplier on how much food pawns of this faction gather when foraging.

maxPawnCostPerTotalPointsCurve.label: Max pawn cost per total points curve
maxPawnCostPerTotalPointsCurve.description: SimpleCurve mapping total raid points to the maximum cost of a single pawn in that raid, preventing cheap high-point groups from being filled with one expensive pawn.

royalTitleTags.label: Royal title tags
royalTitleTags.description: Tags matching RoyalTitleDefs that belong to this faction's title hierarchy.

categoryTag.label: Category tag
categoryTag.description: String tag grouping this faction into a broad category (e.g. Outlander, Tribal, Pirate) used by incidents and scenario filters.

hostileToFactionlessHumanlikes.label: Hostile to factionless humanlikes
hostileToFactionlessHumanlikes.description: If true, this faction attacks humanlikes who belong to no faction.

dropPodActive.label: Drop pod active
dropPodActive.description: ThingDef for the active drop pod used when this faction delivers pawns by drop pod.

dropPodIncoming.label: Drop pod incoming
dropPodIncoming.description: ThingDef for the incoming (falling) drop pod used by this faction.

raidsForbidden.label: Raids forbidden
raidsForbidden.description: If true, this faction never launches raids.

animalsFleeDanger.label: Animals flee danger
animalsFleeDanger.description: If true, animals affiliated with this faction flee from danger.

canRequestTraders.label: Can request traders
canRequestTraders.description: If true, the player can request a caravan trader from this faction via comms console.

canRequestMilitaryAid.label: Can request military aid
canRequestMilitaryAid.description: If true, the player can call for military aid from this faction via comms console.

canRequestOrbitalTrader.label: Can request orbital trader
canRequestOrbitalTrader.description: If true, the player can call an orbital trader from this faction via comms console.

canGenerateQuestSites.label: Can generate quest sites
canGenerateQuestSites.description: If true, quest sites can be generated that belong to this faction.

hideGiftingInHostilityText.label: Hide gifting in hostility text
hideGiftingInHostilityText.description: If true, the gifting option is hidden in hostility explanation tooltips for this faction.

arrivalModeWhitelist.label: Arrival mode whitelist
arrivalModeWhitelist.description: If non-empty, only these PawnsArrivalModeDefs can be used by this faction.

arrivalModeBlacklist.label: Arrival mode blacklist
arrivalModeBlacklist.description: PawnsArrivalModeDefs that this faction may never use.

layerWhitelist.label: Layer whitelist
layerWhitelist.description: If non-empty, this faction only exists on these PlanetLayerDefs.

layerBlacklist.label: Layer blacklist
layerBlacklist.description: PlanetLayerDefs that this faction cannot exist on.

arrivalLayerWhitelist.label: Arrival layer whitelist
arrivalLayerWhitelist.description: PlanetLayerDefs that this faction's pawns may arrive on (all arrival types).

arrivalLayerBlacklist.label: Arrival layer blacklist
arrivalLayerBlacklist.description: PlanetLayerDefs that this faction's pawns may not arrive on (all arrival types).

neutralArrivalLayerWhitelist.label: Neutral arrival layer whitelist
neutralArrivalLayerWhitelist.description: PlanetLayerDefs that this faction's neutral (non-raid) pawns may arrive on.

neutralArrivalLayerBlacklist.label: Neutral arrival layer blacklist
neutralArrivalLayerBlacklist.description: PlanetLayerDefs that this faction's neutral pawns may not arrive on.

raidArrivalLayerWhitelist.label: Raid arrival layer whitelist
raidArrivalLayerWhitelist.description: PlanetLayerDefs that this faction's raids may arrive on.

raidArrivalLayerBlacklist.label: Raid arrival layer blacklist
raidArrivalLayerBlacklist.description: PlanetLayerDefs that this faction's raids may not arrive on.

requiredCountAtGameStart.label: Required count at game start
requiredCountAtGameStart.description: How many instances of this faction are guaranteed to exist at game start.

settlementGenerationWeight.label: Settlement generation weight
settlementGenerationWeight.description: Relative weight controlling how many settlements this faction places on the world map.

generateNewLeaderFromMapMembersOnly.label: Generate new leader from map members only
generateNewLeaderFromMapMembersOnly.description: If true, a replacement leader is selected from existing map members rather than generated fresh.

maxConfigurableAtWorldCreation.label: Max configurable at world creation
maxConfigurableAtWorldCreation.description: Maximum number of this faction the player may configure during world creation. -1 means no cap.

startingCountAtWorldCreation.label: Starting count at world creation
startingCountAtWorldCreation.description: Default number of this faction added during world creation.

configurationListOrderPriority.label: Configuration list order priority
configurationListOrderPriority.description: Sort order in the world-creation faction configuration list.

replacesFaction.label: Replaces faction
replacesFaction.description: FactionDef that this faction replaces when active. The replaced faction will not appear at world creation.

displayInFactionSelection.label: Display in faction selection
displayInFactionSelection.description: If true, this faction appears in the world-creation faction selection list.

techLevel.label: Tech level
techLevel.description: Technology era of this faction, governing available buildings, weapons, and research.

backstoryFilters.label: Backstory filters
backstoryFilters.description: Filters controlling which backstory categories apply to pawn generation for this faction.

backstoryCategories.label: Backstory categories
backstoryCategories.description: Legacy list of backstory category strings. Folded into backstoryFilters on PostLoad for XML compatibility with older mods.

apparelStuffFilter.label: Apparel stuff filter
apparelStuffFilter.description: ThingFilter that restricts which stuff materials this faction may use for apparel.

settlementLootMaker.label: Settlement loot maker
settlementLootMaker.description: ThingSetMakerDef controlling what loot is found in settlements of this faction.

raidLootMaker.label: Raid loot maker
raidLootMaker.description: ThingSetMakerDef controlling what loot raiders from this faction leave behind.

raidLootValueFromPointsCurve.label: Raid loot value from points curve
raidLootValueFromPointsCurve.description: SimpleCurve mapping raid point budget to the total market value of loot dropped. Required -- a config error is reported if missing.

caravanTraderKinds.label: Caravan trader kinds
caravanTraderKinds.description: TraderKindDefs for caravan traders that visit from this faction.

orbitalTraderKinds.label: Orbital trader kinds
orbitalTraderKinds.description: TraderKindDefs for orbital traders that belong to this faction.

visitorTraderKinds.label: Visitor trader kinds
visitorTraderKinds.description: TraderKindDefs for visiting trader groups from this faction.

baseTraderKinds.label: Base trader kinds
baseTraderKinds.description: TraderKindDefs for traders stationed at this faction's settlements.

xenotypeSet.label: Xenotype set
xenotypeSet.description: Weighted set of xenotypes that can appear among pawns generated for this faction.

melaninRange.label: Melanin range
melaninRange.description: FloatRange controlling the skin melanin level of generated pawns. Defaults to 0~1.

disallowedRaidStrategies.label: Disallowed raid strategies
disallowedRaidStrategies.description: RaidStrategyDefs that this faction may never use.

disallowedRaidAgeRestrictions.label: Disallowed raid age restrictions
disallowedRaidAgeRestrictions.description: RaidAgeRestrictionDefs that this faction may never use during raid generation.

mustStartOneEnemy.label: Must start one enemy
mustStartOneEnemy.description: If true, at least one instance of this faction will start the game hostile to the player.

naturalEnemy.label: Natural enemy
naturalEnemy.description: If true, this faction starts at a reduced goodwill and is predisposed to hostility.

permanentEnemy.label: Permanent enemy
permanentEnemy.description: If true, this faction is always hostile to everyone and cannot be allied or traded with normally.

permanentEnemyToEveryoneExceptPlayer.label: Permanent enemy to everyone except player
permanentEnemyToEveryoneExceptPlayer.description: If true, this faction is always hostile to all other factions except the player faction.

permanentEnemyToEveryoneExcept.label: Permanent enemy to everyone except
permanentEnemyToEveryoneExcept.description: FactionDefs that this faction does not treat as permanent enemies. All other factions are treated as permanent enemies.

settlementTexturePath.label: Settlement texture path
settlementTexturePath.description: Texture path for the world map icon representing settlements of this faction.

factionIconPath.label: Faction icon path
factionIconPath.description: Texture path for the faction icon shown in the UI and world map.

colorSpectrum.label: Color spectrum
colorSpectrum.description: List of colors defining the color range for this faction. The first color is the faction's default display color.

royalTitleInheritanceRelations.label: Royal title inheritance relations
royalTitleInheritanceRelations.description: PawnRelationDefs that qualify a pawn as an heir for royal title inheritance.

royalTitleInheritanceWorkerClass.label: Royal title inheritance worker class
royalTitleInheritanceWorkerClass.description: Type name of the RoyalTitleInheritanceWorker subclass controlling how titles are passed on.

royalImplantRules.label: Royal implant rules
royalImplantRules.description: Rules specifying which implants are permitted at each royal title tier.

renounceTitleMessage.label: Renounce title message
renounceTitleMessage.description: Message shown when a pawn renounces their royal title from this faction.

allowedCultures.label: Allowed cultures
allowedCultures.description: CultureDefs that ideologies for this faction may draw from.

requiredMemes.label: Required memes
requiredMemes.description: MemeDefs that the ideology of this faction must include.

allowedMemes.label: Allowed memes
allowedMemes.description: Whitelist of MemeDefs permitted in this faction's ideology. Cannot be used together with disallowedMemes.

disallowedMemes.label: Disallowed memes
disallowedMemes.description: MemeDefs forbidden from this faction's ideology. Cannot be used together with allowedMemes.

disallowedPrecepts.label: Disallowed precepts
disallowedPrecepts.description: PreceptDefs that cannot appear in this faction's ideology.

structureMemeWeights.label: Structure meme weights
structureMemeWeights.description: Weighted selection table for this faction's ideology structure meme. Child element names are MemeDef defNames; text is the float weight.

classicIdeo.label: Classic ideo
classicIdeo.description: If true, factions of this type use the classic ideology mode that existed before Ideology was fully integrated.

fixedIdeo.label: Fixed ideo
fixedIdeo.description: If true, this faction always generates with the same ideology rather than a randomized one.

ideoName.label: Ideo name
ideoName.description: Fixed name for the ideology when fixedIdeo is true.

hiddenIdeo.label: Hidden ideo
hiddenIdeo.description: If true, this faction's ideology is hidden from the player.

ideoDescription.label: Ideo description
ideoDescription.description: Fixed description for the ideology when fixedIdeo is true.

styles.label: Styles
styles.description: StyleCategoryDefs that this faction's ideology may use.

deityPresets.label: Deity presets
deityPresets.description: Fixed deity definitions used when this faction generates an ideology with deities.

forcedMemes.label: Forced memes
forcedMemes.description: MemeDefs that must appear in this faction's ideology in addition to any randomly chosen memes.

requiredPreceptsOnly.label: Required precepts only
requiredPreceptsOnly.description: If true, this faction's ideology contains only the precepts required by its memes, with no additional random ones.

canMakeRandomly.label: Can make randomly
canMakeRandomly.description: Obsolete. Faction generation is now controlled by world creation settings.

dialogFactionGreetingHostile.label: Dialog faction greeting (hostile)
dialogFactionGreetingHostile.description: Greeting text shown in the comms console when this faction is hostile.

dialogFactionGreetingHostileAppreciative.label: Dialog faction greeting (hostile, appreciative)
dialogFactionGreetingHostileAppreciative.description: Greeting text shown when this faction is hostile but appreciative.

dialogFactionGreetingWary.label: Dialog faction greeting (wary)
dialogFactionGreetingWary.description: Greeting text shown when this faction is wary.

dialogFactionGreetingWarm.label: Dialog faction greeting (warm)
dialogFactionGreetingWarm.description: Greeting text shown when this faction is friendly.

dialogMilitaryAidSent.label: Dialog military aid sent
dialogMilitaryAidSent.description: Message shown when this faction dispatches military aid to the player.

messageDefendersAttacking.label: Message defenders attacking
messageDefendersAttacking.description: Message shown when defenders from this faction attack. Supports {0} (pawn type), {1} (faction name), {2} (target name) placeholders.

basic-faction.label: Basic faction
basic-faction.description: A humanlike faction with tech level, pawn singular/plural labels, and an icon.

permanent-enemy.label: Permanent enemy faction
permanent-enemy.description: A faction that is always hostile to everyone.
